retry_reason: refcount_inc never fails; retry is not applicable.
contract_summary: This is a get-wrapper that acquires a reference on the given bfq_group by incrementing its refcount via refcount_inc. The caller must already have a valid pointer to the bfq_group. After calling bfqg_get, the caller owns a reference that must be released with a corresponding bfqg_put (or equivalent) when the reference is no longer needed. The operation is unconditional and always succeeds.

judge.reason: Function consists solely of a refcount_inc call on the bfqg->ref member, with no other logic. Its sole purpose is reference-count acquisition.
